galgame.ending.condition.harem.desc: Maintain intimate relationships with multiple characters, affection at 100
galgame.ending.condition.harem.name: Harem Ending
galgame.ending.condition.lonely.desc: Game exceeds 10 chapters, highest affection below 70
galgame.ending.condition.lonely.name: Lonely Ending
galgame.ending.condition.normal.desc: Game exceeds 10 chapters, highest affection above 70
galgame.ending.condition.normal.name: Normal Ending
galgame.ending.condition.perfect.desc: Achieve a perfect ending with a character, affection at 100 and devoted
galgame.ending.condition.perfect.name: Perfect Ending
galgame.ending.description.harem: Maintained intimate relationships with multiple characters, enjoying the happiness of being surrounded by love.
galgame.ending.description.lonely: Failed to build deep relationships with any character, need to re-examine yourself.
galgame.ending.description.normal: The story has paused for now, but the future holds infinite possibilities.
galgame.ending.description.perfect: Achieved a perfect ending with {character_name}, spending the rest of your lives together.
galgame.ending.story.harem:
In this world full of possibilities, you have built deep connections with {character_name}.

Though this situation troubles you a bit, everyone cares for you in their own way. Perhaps this is what they call a "happy dilemma."

The road ahead is still long. What will you choose?

🌸 **Harem Ending Achieved**
galgame.ending.story.lonely:
Walking alone on familiar streets, you start to think: shouldn't you be more proactive in getting to know the people around you?

Loneliness is not scary; what's scary is giving up the chance to change. Perhaps around the next corner, a new encounter awaits you.

💔 **Lonely Ending Achieved**
galgame.ending.story.normal:
The story doesn't seem to be over yet. Though your relationships with the characters are still developing, this is the way life goes.

Every day is a new beginning, and every encounter could change your fate. Perhaps one day in the future, you will find your true happiness.

📖 **Normal Ending Achieved**
galgame.ending.story.perfect:
Time passed, and after countless adventures and challenges, you and {character_name} finally came together.

On that special day, {character_name} smiled and said to you: "Thank you for always being with me. I want to spend every day of the future with you."

The sunlight fell upon you, warm and beautiful. This is your perfect ending, and the beginning of a new story.

💕 **Congratulations on achieving the Perfect Ending!**
galgame.ending_dialog.title: 游戏结局
